archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Industrial + Dark Automotive)

sections_and_content.title: Hero Section
sections_and_content.content: ROHIT RAJENDRA DHONGADE. Mechanical Engineer & Automotive Technician.
sections_and_content.visuals: Dark luxury car / Mercedes grille background with subtle zoom/parallax. Framer motion entrance. CSS 3D floating text.
sections_and_content.layout: Centered or bold asymmetric overlay with heavy typography. Blueprint SVG lines fading in.

sections_and_content.title: Profile / About Me
sections_and_content.content: Mechanical Engineer, Automotive Technician. Silhouette image.
sections_and_content.visuals: Man silhouette dark. Tachometer-inspired accent elements.
sections_and_content.layout: Grid split: 4 cols image, 8 cols text. High contrast.

sections_and_content.title: Skills Dashboard
sections_and_content.content: Automotive Maintenance & Repair, Mechanical Diagnostics, Preventive Maintenance, Workshop Tools Handling, Quality & Safety, Report Writing, Customer Handling
sections_and_content.visuals: Dashboard control room aesthetic. Progress bars looking like rev counters (RPM). Animated from 0 to target.

sections_and_content.title: Work Experience
sections_and_content.content: B.U. Bhandari Mercedes-Benz Pune (Intern) + Modi Motors Hyundai Baner Pune (Technician).
sections_and_content.visuals: Timeline connected by a solid 'pipe' or glowing neon red wire. Hover reveals 'engine startup' glow.
sections_and_content.layout: Vertical timeline with CSS 3D perspective scroll effects.

sections_and_content.title: Education
sections_and_content.content: ITI NCVT Mechanic (63.85%) + Diploma Mechanical Eng Govt Poly Awsari (64.21%).

sections_and_content.title: Family Workshop: Sai Service
sections_and_content.content: Two-wheeler servicing, Repairing, Maintenance, Oil change. Location: Ahmednagar Maharashtra.
sections_and_content.visuals: Dimly lit workshop tools imagery. Oily/metallic texture overlays.
sections_and_content.layout: Large bento card or full width banner with parallax image.

sections_and_content.title: Hobbies
sections_and_content.content: Bike riding & mechanics; Gaming, Turf, Cricket

motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use Framer Motion 'whileInView' for elements. Create parallax effect on background images using useScroll and useTransform.
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: All cards should have scale 1.02 on hover and border color change to Electric Blaze (#FF3B30).
motion_and_interactions.css_3d: Since Three.js is not allowed, use CSS perspective on containers and rotateX/rotateY based on mouse move or scroll. Use rotating SVG gears or animated SVGs representing engine pistons.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered text reveal with Framer motion, engine starting sound or fast tachometer sweep visual.

ui_components.cards: bg-[#141414] border border-[#27272A] rounded-lg p-6 sm:p-8 backdrop-blur-md relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#FF3B30] transition-colors duration-300
ui_components.buttons: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white font-mono px-6 py-3 uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#FF5A52] transition-colors flex items-center justify-center data-testid='cta-button'
ui_components.navigation: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#27272A]
ui_components.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='nav-about', data-testid='skill-card-diagnostic')

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page immersive portfolio using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion (.jsx/.js files only, NO .tsx).
Do NOT use Three.js. Instead, achieve 3D aesthetics using CSS perspective, rotateX, rotateY, translateZ combined with Framer Motion scroll position (useScroll, useTransform).
Use SVG line animations for blueprints or wireframes of cars/engines.
Implement 'data-testid' attributes on all key text elements, buttons, and navigation links for testing (e.g., data-testid='about-section', data-testid='hero-title').
Font combination: Use 'Chakra Petch' (Google Font) for bold industrial headings and 'JetBrains Mono' for technical body text.
Use the exact image URLs provided in the media_urls object; DO NOT use placeholders.
The color theme must strictly adhere to the dark Obsidian / Neon Red (#FF3B30) palette, evoking a dashboard/control room vibe.
Ensure the hero overlay is not a flat blanket; use gradients or partial masks to let the Mercedes/Car image shine through.
All cards must have a 1px solid stroke with glow effect on hover, mimicking 'Tactical Minimalism'.
